title: 3 real-data acceptance tests conditionally skip when bundled Kaggle CSVs are absent
evidence: acceptance_test.go:396 t.Skipf("real dataset not present at %s: %v", dir, err) — used by TestRealDataLoadsAllCompetitions, TestRealData2019BrasileiraoChampion, TestRealDataTopBrazilianPlayer
suggestion: Embed minimal fixture data or ensure data/kaggle/ is present during scoring so these tests always execute
